jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at DRDO
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DRDO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About DRDO:
DRDO is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO!
